processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'UOM', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end -- Check alter table @@table alter column dvt nchar(32) create index i on @@table (dvt) if @type = '0' delete @@table where dvt in (select dvt from dmdvt) select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmdvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt delete @@table where dvt in (select dvt from #k) -- select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.dvt <> b.dvt and rtrim(a.dvt) like rtrim(b.dvt) ' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmdvt b with (index(PK_dmdvt)) where a.dvt like rtrim(b.dvt) &Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmdvt a, @@table b with (index(i)) where rtrim(a.dvt) like rtrim(b.dvt) ' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into dmdvt(dvt, ten_dvt, ten_dvt2, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' select @q = @q + 'select dvt, ten_dvt, ten_dvt2, ''1'', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), '''', '''', '''', ' select @q = @q + ' 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update dmdvt set ten_dvt = b.ten_dvt, ten_dvt2 = b.ten_dvt2, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmdvt a, #k b where a.dvt = b.dvt end
